description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit Tests that runs on every pull request event. The workflow should have two jobs: test_x86_64 and test_aarch64. The test_x86_64 job should run on a matrix of Python versions 3.7 to 3.12 and operating systems ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and running pytest. The test_aarch64 job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions cp37-cp37m to cp312-cp312, using a Docker image to install dependencies and run pytest.
